_comment: TEMPLATE. Copy this file to data/group_members.json and fill in your group's real members. The real file is git-ignored on purpose: it contains personal data about real people and must never be committed. See AUDIT_REPORT.md P0-2.

members.name: Alice
members._sender_aliases_doc: Optional. Raw chat sender-display strings that don't equal an alias (name-order variants, glued handles). Used by the RAG person-filter to map a chunk's authors to this member. Add entries here when a member's WhatsApp display name would otherwise be missed or collide with another member's alias.
key_facts: Alice is a member of the group.

members.name: Bob
key_facts: Bob is a member of the group.
Bob works as a software engineer.
